data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Cecil Taylor Nichols (born March 3, 1959 in Lansing, Michigan) is an American actor best known for roles in the Whit Stillman films Metropolitan, Barcelona, and The Last Days of Disco. His characters in these films were insecure, stuttering sidekicks to those of the more outgoing Chris Eigeman. Nichols and Eigeman also played minor roles in the independent film The Next Step, released in 1997, of which Nichols was an associate producer.
data.name: Taylor Nichols

data.biography: Ha Seok-jin é um ator sul-coreano amplamente reconhecido por sua versatilidade e carisma. Com uma formação acadêmica em engenharia mecânica pela Universidade Hanyang, ele inicialmente não planejava seguir a carreira artística. No entanto, sua trajetória o levou a explorar o mundo do entretenimento, onde rapidamente se destacou.
data.name: Ha Seok-jin

data.name: Kim Suk-hoon

data.biography:
Lin Yun (林允), also known by her English name Jelly Lin, is a Chinese actress. She is known for her role as the female lead in the 2016 film The Mermaid.

Lin was born Fei Xia (费霞) in Huzhou, Zhejiang, on April 16, 1996. Her father, Fei Jianhua (费建华), is a porter, and her mother is a housewife. She studied at the Huzhou No. 12 Middle School, and then attended a performing arts school in Beijing.

At the age of 18 and with little acting experience, Lin was cast as the female protagonist in the 2016 film The Mermaid directed by Stephen Chow. The Mermaid was the highest-grossing film in China and launched Lin to fame. The same year, Lin featured in the fantasy epic film L.O.R.D: Legend of Ravaging Dynasties, directed and written by Guo Jingming.

Lin starred in another Stephen Chow film, Journey to the West: Conquering the Demons 2 (2017) where she played the White Bone Spirit. She was also cast in the Disney-made romantic comedy The Dreaming Man, as well as historical epic Genghis Khan.

In 2018, Lin starred in her first television series Battle Through the Heavens, a fantasy wuxia drama based on the novel of the same name. She also starred in Beautiful Reborn Flower, a romance melodrama based on the novel of the same name by Anni Baobei; and music-themed romance drama Cantabile Youth, based on the Japanese manga Nodame Cantabile.

In 2019, Lin starred as the female lead in the romance film Fall in Love at First Kiss, a remake of the Taiwanese series of the same name. She also reprised her role in the second installment of the film, The Mermaid.

In 2017, Yun briefly dated Song Weilong, her co-star in Beautiful Reborn Flower.
data.name: Lin Yun

data.biography:
林允，本名费霞，演员。2013年签约博纳星空文化，成为一名模特，走“文艺小清新”路线。接拍宣传短片、杂志，为服装品牌拍摄广告照片，出席车展等活动。

2016年在周星驰电影作品《美人鱼》中饰演该片女主角，正式进入演艺圈，获得第16届纽约亚洲电影节亚洲新星大奖、第12届中美电影节最佳新人奖、第3届中澳国际电影节最佳新人奖等多个奖项 。

2016年在郭敬明执导魔幻电影《爵迹》中饰演天束幽花，2017年在电影《西游伏妖篇》饰演小善，2018年3月出演周星驰导演的环保题材电影《美人鱼2》；同年9月主演的青春励志成长剧集《斗破苍穹》播出 。
data.name: 林允

data.biography: Lâm Duẫn (16/4/1996) là nữ diễn viên trẻ người Trung Quốc sinh ra tại Hồ Châu Chiết Giang. Cô nàng bắt đầu trở nên nổi tiếng sau vai nữ chính trong phim điện ảnh Mỹ Nhân Ngư đạo diễn bởi Châu Tinh Trì. Lâm Duẫn từng được chọn mặt gửi vàng cho những bộ phim và phim điện ảnh: Đấu Phá Thương Khung, Hoa Bỉ Ngạn, Ốc Sên Và Chim Vàng Oanh,...
data.name: Lâm Duẫn

data.biography:
林允，本名費霞，演員。2013 年簽約博納星空文化，成為一名模特，走“文藝小清新”路線。接拍宣傳短片、雜誌，為服裝品牌拍攝廣告照片，出席車展等活動。

2016 年在周星馳電影作品《魔法人魚》中飾演該片女主角，正式進入演藝圈，獲得第 16 屆紐約亞洲電影節亞洲新星大獎、第 12 屆中美電影節最佳新人獎、第 3 屆中澳國際電影節最佳新人獎等多個獎項 。

2016 年在郭敬明執導魔幻電影《爵跡》中飾演天束幽花，2017 年在電影《西遊伏妖篇》飾演小善，2018 年 3 月出演周星馳導演的環保題材電影《美人魚 2》；同年 9 月主演的青春勵志成長劇集《鬥破蒼穹》播出 。
data.name: 林允

data.biography: Tan Duangkaew Piyaoui is a Thai actress managed by Channel 3 (ช่อง 3). She studied at the University of Surrey, obtaining a bachelor's degree in business and economics before getting her Master of Science in management.
data.name: Duangkaew Piyaoui

data.biography: Wayne Lai Yiu-Cheung (Chinese: 黎耀祥) is a Hong Kong actor. He is best known for the 1996 television show Journey to the West, as well as the series Rosy Business and No Regret, which garnered him two Best Actor awards in 2009 and 2010, respectively.
data.name: Wayne Lai Yiu-Cheung

data.biography:
黎耀祥，香港男演員，現為無綫電視部頭合約藝員，曾三奪無綫「萬千星輝頒獎典禮」「最佳男主角」。他 1981 年畢業於聖類斯中學，1983 年加入無綫電視成為營業部文員，1985 年報讀小太陽文娛中心（無綫電視旗下機構）短期演藝訓練課程，獲當時的導師李添勝賞識，並推薦他加入無綫電視藝員訓練班。1986 年開始參演電視劇。

他曾到亞洲電視和影壇發展，2002 年重返無綫電視，2010 年出版探討戲劇與生命關係的《戲劇浮生：黎耀祥論演技與人生》一書。黎耀祥至今拍攝過百部電視劇及近百部電影，持續為香港演藝界服務 30 多年。
data.name: 黎耀祥

data.biography:
黎耀祥（Wayne Lai），1964年5月4日生于香港，中国香港男演员。

1981年毕业于圣类斯中学，1983年加入无线电视成为营业部文员，后进入无线艺员训练班学习。1986年开始参演电视剧。1998年至2002年，到亚洲电视和影坛发展，2002年重返无线电视，在《秀才遇着兵》、《楚汉骄雄》等剧集担演男配角。2009年开始担纲剧集第一男主角，同年凭借《巾帼枭雄》夺得万千星辉颁奖典礼“最佳男主角”。2010年在第44届万千星辉颁奖典礼中，祥仔凭借《巾帼枭雄之义海豪情》蝉联“最佳男主角”奖项。2012年黎耀祥凭《大太监》中李莲英一角，三度问鼎“最佳男主角”。

2014年黎耀祥与黄秋生、汤镇业合作拍摄电视剧《枭雄》。同年与邵美琪、胡定欣等合作主演《商战》。

获得奖项：

万千星辉颁奖典礼最佳男主角(3次)

万千星辉颁奖典礼我最喜爱男角色

万千星辉颁奖典礼最佳男配角

性别：男

国籍：中国香港

籍贯：广东省汕尾市海丰县

生日：1964-5-4

职业：演员

身高：176cm

体重：69kg

学校：圣类斯中学

星座：金牛座
data.name: 黎耀祥

data.biography: 日本著名女性声优、歌手，童星出身，所属事务所为大泽事务所。 在动画《ZEGAPAIN》中首次出演女主角守凪了子，由于其独特的棒读大受好评而为人所认知。 其他代表角色有《化物语》千石抚子、《Angel Beats!》立华奏、《命运石之门》 椎名真由理、《出包王女》结城美柑、《无头骑士异闻录》园原杏里、《我的妹妹不可能那么可爱》五更琉璃、《妖狐×仆SS》髅髅宫歌留多、《绝园的暴风雨》不破爱花、《魔笛MAGI》练红玉、《来自新世界》秋月真理亚、《心理测量者》常守朱、《来自风平浪静的明天》向井户爱花、《伪恋》小野寺小咲、《监狱学园》绿川花等。

data.biography:
Bodhi Rae Breathnach (born August 16, 2011) is an Irish film, television, and stage actor. She is known for her work in literary adaptations, historical drama, and genre films, and has appeared in productions for film, television, and major British theatre institutions.

Breathnach made her feature film debut portraying Susanna Shakespeare in Hamnet (2025), directed by Chloé Zhao, an adaptation of Maggie O’Farrell’s novel of the same name. The film marked her first major international screen role. She later starred as Jessie opposite Jason Statham in the action-drama Shelter (2026).

Her upcoming film work includes a role in Robert Eggers’ Werwulf, a historical horror film set in 13th-century England, as well as a forthcoming screen adaptation of Jane Austen’s Sense and Sensibility, in which she portrays Margaret Dashwood.

In addition to her film career, Breathnach has appeared in British television series, including So Awkward Academy and The Capture. On stage, she starred as Sarah in Beth Steel’s Till the Stars Come Down at London’s National Theatre in 2024.

Breathnach is represented by The Artists Partnership in the United Kingdom. She is the daughter of Irish actor and television presenter Danann Breathnach.
data.name: Bodhi Rae Breathnach

data.biography: Virginia Gardner (born April 18, 1995) is an American actress from Sacramento, California. She is best known for playing Christina Raskin in the found footage film Project Almanac and Karolina Dean in the web television series Marvel's Runaways.
data.name: Virginia Gardner

data.biography: Virginia Gardner ist eine amerikanische Schauspielerin aus Sacramento, Kalifornien. Bekanntheit erlangte sie durch ihre Rollen der Christina Raskin in dem Film Project Almanac und Karolina Dean in der Serie Marvel's Runaways.
Virginia Elizabeth Gardner é uma atriz e modelo norte-americana mais conhecida por interpretar o papel de Karolina Dean na série de televisão original do Hulu, Fugitivos.

Η Βιρτζίνια Γκάρντνερ (γεννημένη στις 18 Απριλίου 1995) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός από το Σακραμέντο της Καλιφόρνια. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστή για τον ρόλο της Χριστίνα Ράσκιν στην ταινία "Project Almanac" και της Καρολίνα Ντιν στη διαδικτυακή τηλεοπτική σειρά Marvel's Runaways

Virginia Gardner, surnommée Ginny Gardner, est une actrice américaine née le 18 avril 1995 à Sacramento, en Californie. Elle est surtout connue pour son rôle de Karolina Dean1 dans la série télévisée Runaways.
弗吉尼亚·加德纳（Virginia Gardner，1995年4月18日-），美国女演员，来自加利福尼亚州萨克拉门托。她最出名的是在发现的镜头电影《年鉴计划》中扮演克里斯蒂娜·拉斯金，在网络电视连续剧《漫威逃亡》中扮演卡罗琳娜·迪恩。
data.name: 弗吉尼亚·加德纳

data.biography:
💥Вирджиния Элизабет Гарднер. Родилась в 1995-ом году в Сакраменто, Калифорния, США. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал врачом, а мать была домохозяйкой. Училась дома. Работает актрисой. С 2023-го замужем за гитаристом Джедом Эллиоттом, детей у пары нет

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Сатурн (2019) [Хэллоуин]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Бегущий в лабиринте: Лекарство от смерти» (2018), «Хэллоуин» (2018), «Моё прекрасное несчастье» (2023), «Вышка» (2022)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Вирджиния почти отказалась от карьеры актрисы из-за травм на съёмках, но продолжила сниматься и стала известной благодаря ролям в триллерах и хоррорах
data.name: Вирджиния Гарднер

data.biography: 弗吉尼亞·加德納（維珍妮亞·葛娜，1995 年 4 月 18 日-），美國女演員，來自加利福尼亞州薩克拉門託。她最出名的是在發現的鏡頭電影《年鑑計劃》中扮演克里斯蒂娜·拉斯金，在網絡電視聯續劇《漫威逃亡》中扮演卡羅琳娜·迪恩。
data.name: 維珍妮亞·葛娜

data.biography: Milton "Lil Rel" Howery Jr. (born December 17, 1979) is an American actor and comedian. Howery is known for playing Robert Carmichael in NBC's television comedy series The Carmichael Show and Rod Williams in the horror film Get Out (2017).
data.name: Lil Rel Howery

data.biography: Milton Howery Jr., conhecido profissionalmente como Lil Rel Howery, é um ator e comediante americano. Howery é mais conhecido por seus papéis como Robert Carmichael na série de comédia de televisão da NBC The Carmichael Show e como oficial da TSA Rod Williams no filme de terror Get Out.

Milton Howery Jr. ( d.17 Aralık 1979), [1] profesyonel olarak Lil Rel Howery olarak bilinen , Amerikalı aktör ve komedyen. Howery, en çok NBC'nin televizyon komedi dizisi The Carmichael Show'daki (2015-2017) Robert Carmichael rolleriyle ve Get Out (2017) korku filminde TSA görevlisi Rod Williams rolleriyle tanınır . Ayrıca yarattığı ve ortak yapımcılığını üstlendiği Rel TV dizisinde de rol aldı.
Milton “Lil Rel” Howery Jr.（1979 年 12 月 17 日出生）是美国演员和喜剧演员。Howery 因在 NBC 的电视喜剧系列《卡迈克尔秀》中扮演罗伯特·卡迈克尔和在恐怖电影《逃脱》（2017 年）中扮演罗德·威廉姆斯而闻名。
data.name: 里尔·莱尔·哈瓦瑞
リル・レル・ハウリー

data.biography: Milton “Lil Rel” Howery Jr. （1979 年 12 月 17 日出生）是美國演員和喜劇演員。Howery 因在 NBC 的電視喜劇系列《卡邁克爾秀》中扮演羅伯特·卡邁克爾和在恐怖電影《絕命狂逃》（2017 年）中扮演洛迪文·威廉姆斯而聞名。

data.biography: Cheung Man-Kit (English: German Cheung, born December 3, 1985) is a Hong Kong actor and action director. He is now an artist of Skyfire Entertainment Ltd.
data.name: German Cheung Man-Kit

data.biography:
是香港男演員和動作指導。2001 年他正式投入多部電視及電影參與幕後工作，現所屬經理公司：天火娱乐文化有限公司。

張文傑自幼受父親影響喜愛武術，10 歲開始正式接觸中國武術，其後並跟隨父親參與各種的雜技及武術表演，他懂得的其他武術有跆拳道、泰拳、拳擊、詠春等。2001 年他正式投入多部電視及電影參與幕後工作，負責特技、舞台動作等工作，亦擔任動作設計、演員替身。2001 及2002 年分別獲得深圳市傳統武術比賽一等及二等獎項，近幾年轉戰幕前，曾參與《風暴》、《一個人的武林》、《迷城》、《沖天火》等電影的拍攝。
data.name: 张文杰

張文傑自幼受父親影響喜愛武術，10 歲開始正式接觸中國武術，其後並跟隨父親參與各種的雜技及武術表演，他懂得的其他武術有跆拳道、泰拳、拳擊、詠春等。2001 年他正式投入多部電視及電影參與幕後工作，負責特技、舞台動作等工作，亦擔任動作設計、演員替身。2001 及 2002 年分別獲得深圳市傳統武術比賽一等及二等獎項，近幾年轉戰幕前，曾參與《風暴》、《一個人的武林》、《迷城》、《沖天火》等電影的拍攝。
data.name: 張文傑

data.biography:
Michael Shamus Wiles (born October 27, 1955) is an American character actor of film and television onscreen since the 1980s who has appeared in over 100 films and television shows.

He portrayed Marc Mitscher in Pearl Harbor and Mr. Parmagi in Hellraiser: Inferno. He is also known for recurring roles as ASAC George Merkert on Breaking Bad and as Jury on Sons of Anarchy. Other notable appearances include Puppet Master 4, Lost Highway, Fight Club, Rock Star and Transformers. In 2011, he appeared in Rockstar Games hit detective game L.A. Noire as Fire Chief Albert Lynch. He appeared in a 2015 production of the Hydrogen Jukebox.
data.name: Michael Shamus Wiles
マイケル・シェイマス・ワイルズ

data.biography:
吴美珩（Ng Mei Heng, Melissa），1972年5月5日生于广东中山，1978年移民美国。

1992年参加全美华埠小姐选举获得冠军，1996年参加国际华裔小姐竞选获得亚军，加入香港无线电视成为旗下艺员。1997年，吴美衍出演TVB电视《刑事侦缉档案Ⅲ》和《鉴证实录》。2004年，在《楚汉骄雄》里饰演虞姬。2005年，主演时装剧《人间蒸发》和医疗剧《妙手仁心Ⅲ》。2006年，在《女人唔易做》里饰演女一号高志玲，该剧凭平均收视33点、最高收视41点成为全年收视冠军。
data.name: 吴美珩

data.biography:
吳美珩（Ng Mei Heng, Melissa），1972 年 5 月 5 日生於廣東中山，1978 年移民美國。

1992 年參加全美華埠小姐選舉獲得冠軍，1996 年參加國際華裔小姐競選獲得亞軍，加入香港無線電視成為旗下藝員。1997 年，吳美衍出演 TVB 電視《刑事偵緝檔案Ⅲ》和《鑑證實錄》。2004 年，在《楚漢驕雄》裏飾演虞姬。2005 年，主演時裝劇《人間蒸發》和醫療劇《妙手仁心Ⅲ》。2006 年，在《女人唔易做》裏飾演女一號高志玲，該劇憑平均收視 33 點、最高收視 41 點成為全年收視冠軍。
data.name: 吳美珩

data.biography: Natalia participou de uma variedade de produções colombianas, se aventurar em televisão em 2003, em "Gangues, Guerra e Paz" da série, mais tarde, é o anfitrião do programa infantil "Clube 10", em seguida, ele participa nas novelas: "Professional "" Muñoz no valor de 2 'e' Bermúdez 'Caracol Television, é o protagonista do filme' Elephant Red 'ganhou melhor filme e direção da Escola de Artes Visuais de Nova York em 2009. em 2010 jogou' Fabiana Medina " Isa TK + na série da Nickelodeon. Em 2011 faz um excelente desempenho com o caráter de "Ana Lucía Giraldo" (Um boxeador lésbica jovem) na novela RCN "A mão limpa." Em 2011 estabeleceu-se em Nova York para estudar na prestigiosa atuação Lee Strasberg. Faz vários curtas-metragens, comerciais, séries de web dirigido por acabou de se mudar Clementine Cayrol e Chess filme francês Michel Cosma. Ele está atualmente na terceira temporada da série NINJA cumbia para a Fox, onde ele compartilha conjunto com o seu companheiro também Isa TK + Ricardo Abarca e Brenda Asnicar (Patito Feo) participou como "Florence Guerrero" na versão colombiana da série Argentina doce amor por Caracol Televisão e faz parte do filme Exilado Diego Guerra. Apresentado em 2015 "Lady, The Rose Seller", produzido pela Sony Pictures Television Teleset com grande sucesso em toda a América Latina a ser emitido pela Netflix, RCN e séries Univisión. Também faz parte da Companhia Exilia2 Teatro, um dos mais importantes da nova cena teatral colombiano.
Natalia Reyes is a Colombian actress known for her starring role in the Sony Pictures Television series Lady, la vendedora de rosas.
data.name: Natalia Reyes

data.biography: Natalia Reyes Gaitán (* 6. Februar 1987 in Bogotá) ist eine kolumbianische Schauspielerin. Sie wirkte bis 2016 lediglich in kolumbianischen Fernsehserien und -filmen mit und übernahm auch Synchronisationsrollen. In Pickpockets: Meister im Stehlen, Running with the Devil und Terminator: Dark Fate wirkte sie in großen US-amerikanischen Produktionen mit.  Quelle: Wikipedia

Natalia Reyes Gaitán (Bogotá, 1987. február 6. –) kolumbiai színésznő, aki főszerepet játszott a Terminátor: Sötét végzet című filmben, amelynek James Cameron volt a producere, Tim Miller pedig a rendezője. Ezt megelőzően Latin-Amerikában az Oscar-jelölt Ciro Guerra és Cristina Gallego Oscar-díjra jelölt filmjében, Az átkelés madaraiban (2018) játszott szerepéről vált ismertté; valamint a Sony Pictures Television Lady, la vendedora de rosas című sorozatának főszerepéért. Szülőhazájában más televíziós műsorokból is ismert, mint például az Isa TK+, a Dulce amor és a Cumbia Ninja.

data.biography: 福山潤是日本的男性聲優、歌手。出生於廣島縣福山市，成長於大阪府高槻市，畢業於大阪府立大冠高中，所屬公司為 Black Ship。
data.name: 福山潤

data.biography:
福山润（日语：福山 潤／ふくやま じゅん Fukuyama Jun，1978年11月26日—）是一名日本男性声优（配音员）、歌手。生于广岛县福山市，出身于大阪府高槻市。BLACK SHIP代表取缔役CEO。在日本喜爱他的声优迷们昵称他为ジュン或ジュンジュン（润润）。

高二时喜欢的女孩子（同级生）对"声优"的世界非常向往，而自己对动画影集（アニメ）也很有兴趣，为了能更靠近她，在有了这个共通的话题之后，于是两人一起通勤就读起声优养成学校（青二塾大阪校）。

但是不久这女孩却在中途放弃了成为声优的志愿，还有一学年，自己也即将面临是否该继续升学或是就业的抉择。察觉到自己一直以来仍喜爱着声优这个充满魅力的职业，经过了一番审慎的思考，决定继续朝声优之路迈进，做为最初欲"探求自己的可能性"的挑战，也因此才有声优福山润的诞生。
data.name: 福山润
จุง ฟุกุยะมะ

data.biography: 福山潤是日本的男性聲優、歌手。出生於廣島縣福山市，成長於大阪府高槻市，畢業於大阪府立大冠高中，所屬公司為 Black Ship。

data.biography:
Dimitrij Schaad wuchs bis zu seinem achten Lebensjahr nahe der ehemaligen kasachischen Hauptstadt Almaty auf. 1993 übersiedelte er ohne deutsche Sprachkenntnisse mit seiner Familie nach Deutschland und besuchte bis 2005 das Gymnasium Mengen.

Nach dem Abitur studierte er von 2005 bis 2009 Schauspiel an der Bayerischen Theaterakademie August Everding und 2009 am Staatlichen Institut der darstellenden Künste in Sankt Petersburg. Er spielte am Metropoltheater München, den Münchner Kammerspielen und erhielt 2006 und 2008 das Schauspielstipendium des Deutschen Bühnenvereins.

2009 begann er sein Erstengagement am Schauspiel Essen und wechselte 2010 mit Intendant Anselm Weber ans Schauspielhaus Bochum, dessen Ensemble er bis 2013 angehörte. Dort arbeitete er mit den Regisseuren Sebastian Nübling, Roger Vontobel und Jan Klata zusammen.

Seit 2013 ist er unter Shermin Langhoff und Jens Hillje Ensemblemitglied am Maxim-Gorki-Theater Berlin. Hier arbeitete er unter anderem wieder mit Sebastian Nübling sowie Yael Ronen, Hakan Savaş Mican, Mirko Borscht und Sebastian Baumgarten. Schaad hat bisher in fast jedem Stück am Maxim-Gorki-Theater einen Monolog gesprochen, die Texte dafür schreibt er selbst. Für seine Rollen in der Spielzeit 2013/14 wurde er in der Kritikerumfrage von Theater heute mit sieben Stimmen zum Nachwuchsschauspieler des Jahres gewählt.

Er steht auch für Fernseh- und Filmproduktionen vor der Kamera und lebt und arbeitet in Berlin.

Seit 2015 ist er freier Dozent an der Hochschule für Schauspielkunst Ernst Busch.

In der von X-Filme produzierten Kino-Verfilmung des Bestsellers "Die Känguru Chroniken" von Marc-Uwe Kling übernimmt Schaad die Hauptrolle des Kleinkünstlers Marc-Uwe
data.name: Dimitrij Schaad

data.biography: Shugo Nakamura is a Japanese voice actor and singer affiliated with Across Entertainment and Lantis. He is best known for voicing Teru Tendo in The Idolmaster SideM, Issei Kuga in TsukiPro, and Tomoki Takashima in Chūbyō Gekihatsu Boy. Nakamura was one of four male voice actors who won the Best New Actor Award at the 13th Seiyu Awards in 2019. Nakamura ranked in second place at the 2017-2018 Newtype Anime Awards.

Frieren: Pháp Sư Tiễn Táng
data.overview: Sau một thập kỷ phiêu lưu, Frieren cùng tổ đội của dũng sĩ Himmel đã đánh bại Ma vương và mang lại hòa bình cho thế giới. Thế rồi cô ấy, một Elf với thọ mệnh hơn cả ngàn năm tuổi, lập lời hứa sẽ tái ngộ cùng nhóm Himmel rồi lên đường đi phiêu lưu một mình. 50 năm sau, Frieren đến thăm Himmel, nhưng lúc này anh ta đã già và chỉ còn lại một chút thời gian ngắn ngủi. Chứng kiến cái chết của Himmel, Frieren hối hận vì đã không "tìm hiểu nhiều hơn về con người", và thế là một chuyến phiêu lưu mới của cô với mục đích trên đã bắt đầu. Trên chuyến phiêu lưu này, cô đã gặp gỡ rất nhiều người và trải qua rất nhiều sự kiện.

data.biography: Roh Jeong-eui is a South Korean actress. She was born July 31, 2001 and made her acting debut in 2011. She has appeared in several films and numerous television dramas since her debut including, “Dream High 2” (2012), “Angel Eyes” (2014), and “Kill It” (2019).
data.name: Roh Jeong-eui

data.biography: 他七岁开始拍电影，学历只有中四程度。十六岁(1976年)签约TVB，七十年代在儿童节目《跳飞机》中饰演“怪兽”，1982年凭电影《忌廉沟鲜奶》获提名角逐第19届金马奖最佳男主角。后转战乐坛，偕杜丽莎之弟Fred Carpio合组Crystal Zone(水晶迷)乐队，担任鼓手，于1987年嘉士伯流行音乐节获得“最佳原创歌曲”、“最佳吉他手”以及“银奖”三项奖项，现时是一间速递公司的经理。
data.name: 严秋华

data.biography: 他七歲開始拍電影，學歷只有中四程度。十六歲 (1976 年) 籤約 TVB，七十年代在兒童節目《跳飛機》中飾演“怪獸”，1982 年憑電影《忌廉溝鮮奶》獲提名角逐第 19 屆金馬獎最佳男主角。後轉戰樂壇，偕杜麗莎之弟 Fred Carpio 合組 Crystal Zone (水晶迷) 樂隊，擔任鼓手，於 1987 年嘉士伯流行音樂節獲得“最佳原創歌曲”、“最佳吉他手”以及“銀獎”三項獎項，現時是一間速遞公司的經理。
data.name: 嚴秋華
Fate/strange Fake
data.overview: Trong một cuộc chiến Chén Thánh, các Pháp sư (Master) và Linh hồn Anh hùng (Servant) của họ chiến đấu để giành quyền kiểm soát Chén Thánh—một thiết bị ban điều ước toàn năng được cho là có thể thực hiện bất kỳ điều ước nào. Nhiều năm đã trôi qua kể từ khi kết thúc Cuộc chiến Chén Thánh lần thứ năm ở Nhật Bản. Bây giờ, những dấu hiệu báo trước sự xuất hiện của một Chén Thánh mới ở thành phố Snowfield phía tây nước Mỹ

data.biography: Lee Seung-yeon first gained attention for her authentic and emotionally resonant portrayals of youth in short films. Her career reached a significant milestone in September 2025, when she was awarded the prestigious 'Actor of the Year' at the 30th Busan International Film Festival (BIFF) for her standout performance in the independent feature The Gorals.  Recognized by critics for her "stable and proactive" acting style, she is considered a "next-generation prospect". In early 2026, she began her first major television role in the MBC drama In Your Radiant Season, marking her successful expansion into the mainstream industry.
data.name: Lee Seung-yeon

data.biography:
Kim Tae-ri (김태리) is a South Korean actress. Kim started her career appearing in theater productions and modelling in TV adverts. She made her feature film debut in Park Chan-wook's film The Handmaiden (2016) where she was chosen from among 1,500 candidates who auditioned for the role. Park's first impression of Kim reminded him strongly of his first meeting with actress Kang Hye-jung, who had her career breakthrough in Park's film Oldboy (2003).

Kim also starred in 1987: When the Day Comes (2017) and Little Forest (2018).
data.name: Kim Tae-ri

data.biography: Kim Tae-ri è un'attrice sudcoreana. Kim ha iniziato la sua carriera apparendo in produzioni teatrali e come modella in spot televisivi. Ha debuttato nel cinema nel film di Park Chan-wook "The Handmaiden" (2016), dove è stata scelta tra 1.500 candidate che si sono presentate al provino per il ruolo. La prima impressione che Park ha avuto di Kim gli ha ricordato molto il suo primo incontro con l'attrice Kang Hye-jung, che ha avuto la sua svolta nella carriera nel film di Park "Oldboy" (2003).
data.name: Kim Tae-ri

data.biography: 金泰梨 韩国女演员，毕业于庆熙大学新闻系。2014年通过拍摄广告出道。2016年以首部长篇电影《下女的诱惑》获得青龙电影奖、亚洲电影大奖等多个最佳新人奖。2018年首度担纲主演电视剧——创下韩国有线台最高平均收视记录的《阳光先生》，使其演技受到进一步认可，并直接入围第55届百想艺术大赏电视部门女子最优秀演技赏。
data.name: 金泰梨

data.biography: Kim Tae-ri (김태리) es una actriz de Corea del Sur. Kim comenzó su carrera apareciendo en producciones teatrales y modelando en anuncios de televisión. Hizo su debut cinematográfico en la película The Handmaiden (2016) de Park Chan-wook, donde fue elegida entre 1500 candidatos que audicionaron para el papel. La primera impresión que tuvo Park de Kim le recordó mucho a su primer encuentro con la actriz Kang Hye-jung, quien tuvo su avance en la carrera en la película de Park, Oldboy (2003).

Kim Tae-ri (김태리) es una actriz de Corea del Sur. Kim comenzó su carrera apareciendo en producciones teatrales y modelando en anuncios de televisión. Hizo su debut cinematográfico en la película The Handmaiden (2016) de Park Chan-wook, donde fue elegida entre 1500 candidatos que audicionaron para el papel. La primera impresión que tuvo Park de Kim le recordó mucho a su primer encuentro con la actriz Kang Hye-jung, quien tuvo su avance en la carrera en la película de Park, Oldboy (2003).

Kim Tae-ri yang lahir pada 24 April 1990 adalah aktris asal Korea Selatan. Sebelum memulai karirnya sebagai aktris dia mempunyai keinginan untuk menjadi seorang penyiar, ia mendaftar di Departemen Jurnalisme dan Penyiaran (sekarang Departemen Media) di Universitas Kyung Hee. Sampai saat itu, dia belum tertarik pada akting, teater, atau film. Kim Tae-ri pertama kali berhubungan dengan akting di klub drama perguruan tinggi. Pada tahun pertamanya, ia melihat sebuah drama merekrut anggota baru dan bergabung dengan klub drama, dan di tahun keduanya, ia memutuskan untuk mengejar karir sebagai aktor teater.

Kim Tae- ri memulai karirnya dengan tampil dalam produksi teater dan menjadi model iklan TV. Ia memulai debut film layar lebarnya dalam film Park Chan-wook yang berjudul The Handmaiden (2016) di mana ia terpilih dari 1.500 kandidat yang mengikuti audisi untuk peran tersebut. Dia terkenal karena membintangi film The Handmaiden (2016), Little Forest (2018), Space Sweepers (2020) dan drama sejarah Mr. Sunshine (2018). Baru-baru ini, Ia mendapatkan pengakuan lebih lanjut untuk peran utamanya dalam drama percintaan remaja di Twenty-Five Twenty-One (2022). Ia memenangkan kategori Penghargaan Aktris Terbaik pada 58th Baeksang Arts Awards.
金泰梨 韓國女演員，畢業於慶熙大學新聞系。2014 年通過拍攝廣告出道。2016 年以首部長篇電影《下女誘罪》獲得青龍電影獎、亞洲電影大獎等多個最佳新人獎。2018 年首度擔綱主演電視劇——創下韓國有線台最高平均收視記錄的《陽光先生》，使其演技受到進一步認可，並直接入圍第 55 屆百想藝術大賞電視部門女子最優秀演技賞。
data.name: 金泰梨
